privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic student data created by setup_task.sh: three fictional students (James Miller, Sarah Wilson, Robert Chen) with grades posted to the real OpenSIS student information system. All metadata values are verified: course name 'World History' is created in the database setup (setup_task.sh:59), student names are created in the database (setup_task.sh:82-84), and grade-to-letter mappings (92%=A, 85%=B, 76%=C) conform to standard US grading scales where A is 90-100%, B is 80-89%, and C is 70-79%.
